authority: Founder D-194 (real-Agent A1 harness amendment); subject protocol = CODEX_BENCHMARK_SUBJECT_PROTOCOL_v1 (D-193 PART I).
status: FIXTURE_VALIDATED / NOT_EXECUTED. Authorizes harness CODE only — no merge, no Agent/relay/F2AI execution, no A1 promotion.
tool_call_gate_note: D-194 C4: the tool-call evidence gate is a DESIGN PATH, NOT 'resolved'. Qualification + execution are separately gated.
relay_note: AVAILABLE-arm MCP transport = the per-episode local-loopback P6 relay (src/mcp_trace_relay.ts). The relay url is assigned at episode start (OS ephemeral port) and substituted into the AVAILABLE template's __RELAY_ENDPOINT__ placeholder. CONTROL never receives a relay.

non_f2ai_capability_parity.method_a_definition: Disable native web/network tools IDENTICALLY in both arms; the only F2AI path is the AVAILABLE-arm relay. Direct F2AI outside the relay is PROHIBITED and invalidates the episode.
non_f2ai_capability_parity.codex: read-only FS sandbox + sandbox network_access=false (a read-only FS alone does NOT disable web)
non_f2ai_capability_parity.claude: --disallowedTools 'Edit Write Bash WebSearch WebFetch' in BOTH arms
non_f2ai_capability_parity.honesty: METHOD A reduces realism (no native web) in exchange for a machine-provable neutral test: capability sets are identical across arms and no direct-F2AI bypass exists.

model_id_fail_closed: Each cell's MODEL_ID is the placeholder UNRESOLVED_AT_EXECUTION_FREEZE and READY_FOR_RUN=false. src/subject_runner.ts assertModelResolved() rejects 'codex','default','latest', bare 'opus','claude', empty, any unresolved/placeholder id, or an id not confirmed by the client. This PR defines the schema + guard; it does NOT select a model.

CONTROL.note: no F2AI MCP server registered in the disposable CODEX_HOME
EXPLICIT empty baseline mcp config (not mere omission)

AVAILABLE.note: identical baseline + exactly one F2AI relay entry

acceptance.logic: Both required passing -> A1_PASS reachable. Codex missing -> A1_INSUFFICIENT. Claude missing -> A1_INSUFFICIENT. One passing cannot hide one failing. Pooled cannot override a cell failure. Legacy self-loop cells cannot satisfy a required gate. An optional 3rd cannot compensate. A1_PASS_WITH_LIMITATIONS cannot waive a missing/failing required cell. Qualification cannot promote A1. Handshake cannot satisfy RARR. tools/list cannot violate CNU. Only a tools/call enters autonomous classification.
acceptance.implemented_in: src/subject_runner.ts reconcileRequiredCells() + acceptRequiredCells() (matrix-bound runtime acceptance authority)

acceptance_authority_pointer.note: D-200 §M repoint: STABLE repository metadata ONLY (source_path + exported_symbol_name + authority_role). NO commit SHA / machine path / binary hash here — those belong to the future sealed manifest. Reconciled at preflight against config/matrix.json + the actual runtime descriptor (frozen_launch_identity.ts reconcileAcceptanceAuthority); a stale acceptTwoCell / missing symbol / cross-config drift fails closed.
